shows.title: Stargazers Adventure Club
shows.tagline: For children aged 4-8 and their people
shows.description: Blast off with Stargazers Adventure Club in Planetary Games, an interactive space spectacular where imagination fuels the fun! You’ll learn planetary facts from out-of-this-world host, Astro the Alien as the Stargazers “bubble port” across all eight planets. This family friendly adventure is packed with music, movement, comedy and audience participation. In Stargazers Adventure Club: Planetary Games, everyone who has fun is a winner! 🚀 🪐 💫

shows.title: Rising Stars Burlesque Revue
shows.description:
Come see Chicago's hottest up-and-coming burlesque stars! Experience the next generation of spectacle at Rising Stars, an alluring burlesque and variety revue that honors the Windy City's storied legacy of live entertainment. This high-energy showcase brings together the city's most captivating emerging burlesque dancers and variety entertainment for a night full of fun, whimsy, humor, and seduction. Whether you're a long-time fan of burlesque or a curious newcomer, we invite you to come enjoy Stars & Garters' intimate venue, world-class cocktails, and unforgettable performance artists.

Every Rising Stars show features a unique roster of talent, so there's reason to come back again and again. (Follow @starsandgarterstheater on instagram to see when your favorite performers are scheduled for a show.)

shows.title: Starlets Presents
shows.description: Chicago's premiere burlesque showcase featuring performances by the city's finest performers.

shows.title: Laugh-Along, Live!
shows.tagline: Watch movies with Chicago's funniest comedians
shows.description: Laugh-Along, Live! is a comedy show, movie screening, and party wrapped in one. Three comedians make jokes throughout a film (à la Mystery Science Theater) and run activities for the audience. Audience participation is encouraged, as our shows often include drinking games, costume contests, trivia quizzes, dance-offs, and more.

shows.title: FreakShow & Tell
shows.description:
21+ ONLY

Brianna Wellen, Chicago Reader:

"Sideshow entertainer Thom Britton’s solo show is part performance, part demonstration. Britton is a charismatic performer who appears genuinely thrilled to share how simple his seemingly death-defying acts really are. His explanations are peppered with jokes and carnival flair, making even the dullest details memorable and entertaining. I may have retained more information about science and history during a single carnival-themed night than in all my years of schooling"

Sideshow performer Thom Britton created a stage show to answer the barrage of questions he regularly received before, during, and after his performances.

People wanted to know how he could possibly eat fire or drive a nail into his head or why he'd want to walk on broken glass or stand on an electrified plate. Thus was born "FreakShow & Tell," an hour and fifteen-minute long stage show that fuses science, history, anatomy, physics, and a whole slew of others with genuine sideshow acts such as The Electric Man, Fire Eating and Glass Walking, amongst other things.

The show is funny, poignant, entertaining, fast-paced, and 100% science!

shows.title: M.A.S.T.E.R.M.I.N.D.S.
shows.description:
Calling all evil-doers, charlatans, and ne'er-do-wells! Come participate in a board meeting for villains!

See slideshows of nefarious plans presented by 4 nefarious villains!

All facilitated by the powerful chairperson of the board, MindMaster (Gib Christensen)

M.A.S.T.E.R.M.I.N.D.S. (Menaces Assessing Strategic Tactics End Rogues Making Intelligent Maneuvers Diabolically Shhh) is a slide presentation comedy show that involves audience participation, so come prepared to get villainous with us! Every month we have a different set of villains. Follow us @mastermindschicago on instagram for info on future shows.

shows.title: Chicago's Workshop Mic
shows.description: Chicago stand up comedians workshop new material.

shows.title: DK's Full Five Fridays
shows.description: 10 of Chicago's best up and coming comedians for only $10

shows.title: The Re:Up - A Monthly Comedy Show
shows.description:
Featuring:
Devin Glass
Ryan Kruger
Kevin Kicmal
Nicky B
Xavier Smith

shows.title: A Witty Ditty Committee
shows.description: A musical improv show starring B-Sticky and special guest Wilem.

shows.title: The Real Spacewives of Alderaan
shows.description: The Real Spacewives of Alderaan is a fully improvised reality show adventure across the galaxy. Honoring the tropes of both Bravo TV and Star Wars, our show revolves around the wealthy elite women of the luxurious Alderaan system. Our all-femme cast of spacewives and host Andi-Wan Cohnobi create a hilarious, unscripted episode of reality TV featuring fierce rivalries, out-of-this-world fashion, and enough chaos to rival a galactic civil war.

shows.title: Down & Down Presents
shows.description: Stand-up comics take the stage for one night only.

shows.title: Burly-oke!
shows.description:
Get ready to trade your shower-singing sessions for the spotlight at Burly-oke!, the ultimate mashup of karaoke and burlesque! From 8:00 PM to 11:00 PM, we're turning the stage over to you...and the incredible burlesque performers of Stars & Garters.

Pop-Up Karaoke will be in the house providing their signature, best-in-Chicago, karaoke experience. While you croon a ballad, belt a rock anthem, or sing a pop bop, our professional burlesque performers will be right there with you delivering improvised, show-stopping dances every few songs. Feel free to drop in for a song, or stay for the full three-hour spectacle.

While there is no cover charge to join the fun, we do require a two-item minimum purchase and tipping the dancers and KJ is encouraged.

If you want to elevate your evening, grab a VIP table to secure the best view in the house with front-row seating and a special gift. The best part? VIP guests are guaranteed that at least one of their karaoke selections will feature a live burlesque dancer performing alongside them.

Come see the magic one-night only: April 1st. Gather your friends, warm-up your vocal chords, and get ready for a karaoke night like no other.

shows.title: Date Night: Live
shows.description:
First dates are awkward enough… let's put them on stage!

On this evening, at the romantic Stars & Garters, two singles will meet for the first time. Watch them fall in love… unless they don't! 3 rounds, 2 singles, 1 epic first date.

shows.title: The Gap
shows.description: Top local stand-ups take the stage.

shows.title: A Random Memory
shows.description:
A Random Memory is an intimate magic and mentalism show worth remembering. Every trick uses the audience's own cares, wishes and memories to create magic with emotional weight. Instead of another round of generic card tricks featuring kings and aces, the show opens with a nearly blank deck of cards and each trick fills out more of the deck with things the audience cares about. To bring things full circle and remind us all that even this show will only be a memory, the audience performs a magic trick of their own that destroys the deck they spent the last hour building.

A Random Memory is the brainchild of magician, Dan Feltey. Dan is a software engineer by trade who fell in love with magic in 2018 and never gave it up. Dan got his start in magic taking classes at Magic Inc., and The Chicago Magic Lounge, before joining Open Heart Magic in 2023 as a bedside magician. Open Heart Magic is a non-profit organization that trains volunteers to perform magic at children's hospitals throughout the midwest, and emphasizes magic that makes the child the center of every trick. Dan brings this philosophy to A Random Memory, allowing the audience to become the star of the show and experience the magic themselves.

shows.title: Cabaret Week 2026: Mashups & More
shows.tagline: You pick the songs. We build the show.
shows.description:
Join The Beaus for a one-night-only, high-energy cabaret where no two moments are planned—and everything is shaped by the audience.

Featuring mashups and hits from Broadway, pop, disco, rock, jazz, country, and more, this interactive experience puts you in control. Before the show begins, you'll choose your favorite artists from a curated list. From there, The Beaus create a completely original performance on the fly.

Featuring the full Beaus cast, this is a night of music, comedy, and controlled chaos—where anything can happen, and you won't know what you're getting until it starts.

shows.title: Butterface
shows.tagline: Her sketches are funny... but her face
shows.description: BUTTERFACE is a two-person sketch show extravaganza exploring themes of compassion, love, empathy, and cringe. Written and performed through the vessels of Brady Barrow and Ollie Grishaber, these two will bring the beauty of HOPE back to comedy by doing the unspeakable: being two women with okay faces. Sure, the sketches are really good...but her face!

shows.title: Cabaret Week 2026: I'm M$ B'Havin
shows.tagline: Not Your Typical Mama... Memories of a Life Well Lived in Songs
shows.description: A mature Diva, I'm M$ B'Havin is built on a young woman's frame; however, she's not your typical Mama! She'll give you the Blues, with a little bit of Burlesque, Comedy, Jazz, R&B, and a whole lot of sass!

shows.title: Boylesque
shows.description:
Hosted by Lando Graves
Pole performances by Wolfie J

shows.title: The Conspirators Present: Tartuffe, or, The Charlatan
shows.description:
by Molière
directed by Wm. Bullion
producer & Style coach: Sid Feldman

The Conspirators lovingly dismantle Molière's classic comedy about the dangers of cultishly believing only what you choose to believe despite a mountain of evidence to the contrary. SOUND FAMILIAR?

shows.title: Rorschach Baby
shows.description:
Doctor Rorschach is BACK with his signature show: Rorschach Baby Fixes YOU. Through a chaotic mix of sharp sketches, unforgettable characters, and a fully improvised long-form finale, this show promises what no one else can—total emotional repair (results not guaranteed).

Featuring some of Chicago's most established comedians and improvisers, you'll leave feeling lighter, slightly unhinged, and at the very least… hoping for another appointment with the Doctor.

Featuring:
Travis Bergman, Jason Clark, Katie Rae Horn, Andrew Kerr, Nick Martini, Jace Mertes, Daniella Pereira, Jazmin Robinson & Stephen Shoemaker.

Coach: Jake Prizant (Deli Boys, Missed Call, Creamboy)

Follow us on Instagram @rorschachbabyimprov

shows.title: Velvet Vixens Cabaret Vol. 3: Velvet Reverie
shows.description:
Step into the sultry and whimsical world of Velvet Reverie, a dazzling burlesque variety cabaret that feels like a glamorous dream full of bold self-expression. Featuring an all–queer women cast, this vibrant showcase blends classic tease with contemporary edge, delivering a night of unforgettable performances.

From sultry striptease to playful, high-energy acts, each performer brings their own unique flair to the stage—starring Clit Hardwood, Midnight Jade, Arrachna Fatale, Mama Pipe, Ms. Lady Ryder, and hosted by THE Trixie Pickles!

shows.title: Shakespeare Blood Oath
shows.tagline: An abridged play of William Shakespeare
shows.description:
When we founded SBO, we made an oath to do all of Shakespeare's plays, even the bad ones.

Well, it's finally time to do one of the bad ones — Henry VIII. Frankly, we couldn't be more excited!

No two performances will be the same! Heck, no two casts will be the same! This year, SBO will be injecting the chaos and energy of short-form improv into the work of William Shakespeare, with games, audience participation, and more to make light work of what some might describe as a slog of a play. The biggest twist … the SBO players will train and rehearse to perform any role in the play, and each performance will be cast in front of the audience at the beginning of the show. The Director and Producer will guide them throughout in order to put up a show that's fit for a Queen. Maybe some improv games? Maybe some on-the-spot punch-up's? They may even have to deal with the whims of Queen Elizabeth, herself. That's right! Our very own Queen Elizabeth will be in attendance. But will she approve of this year's production? Or will she be her father's daughter and condemn the cast to the Executioner?

shows.title: Whatever We Feel
shows.tagline: A High-energy Romp through Chicago's Performing Arts

shows.title: Marti & Mimi's 250th B-Day Charity Ball
shows.tagline: Featuring "The Professor" and Chris Shitpants as "The Sludge"
shows.description: Marti, Mimi, and America are turning 250 this year! Join your favorite rival clown politicians and special guest performers The Professor and Chris Shitpants as The Sludge for a night of non-stop celebration, a patriotic trip down memory lane, and performances like nothing you have seen before on a Chicago stage, because everyone is too scared of getting down like Toronto! Proceeds will be donated to the Trans Youth Emergency Project.

shows.title: Frankenfilms
shows.tagline: A complete bastardization of the cinematic arts
shows.description: An improvised dubbing show where we take the pieces of America's favorite movies and mash them together, take out all the dialogue, and have improvisers dub over it!

shows.title: Love, The Sinners
shows.description:
Production Productions invites you to the first public reading of LOVE, THE SINNERS, written by Maggie Smith and directed by Eliza Tryon!

Join our cast and creative team for a public presentation of this new play before its world premiere production in the fall of 2026, followed by an interactive talkback!

“While preparing for a normal year at their Catholic high school, a group of queer teenagers are suddenly faced with a new series of anti-LGBTQ+ rules created by their city's archdiocese, threatening to expel each one of them. Tired of their school's "hate the sin, love the sinner" mentality, the teenagers turn to malicious compliance as a means of protest, boycotting every academic material and lesson plan that they argue goes against Church teachings.”

Cast: Mak Van Raalte, Orion Hay-Miller, Rocky Nguyen, Audrey Yang, Gwyneth Puryear, Grey Sindaco, Annie Smith, Madeleine Moderhack, Emylie Johnson, Alex Marusich, and Baneet Chawla

shows.title: New Comedy Order
shows.description:
New Comedy Order is recruiting new members. As a show of good faith, they've brought in Chicago's best stand-up comedians. Come prepared to hoot, holler, and raise your chrism oil for a merger with the godhead.

The New Comedy Order is like the Knights Templar for laughing. Their Kabbalah is Jerry Seinfeld's 23 Hours to Kill. When they were wandering the desert seeking enlightenment, they were all like, "Jeez, where's the service around here?" Now, their Third Eye is open and it's watching Simpsons reruns.

There are 33 vertebrae in the spine, 33 years in Jesus' life, and honestly way more than 33 minutes of lowkey tough comedy in this show. For the best laughs between Joachim and Boaz, spend a night with the New Comedy Order.

shows.title: Secret Third Thing
shows.description: Chicago’s only all non-binary and gender non-conforming improv team; specializing in long form narrative improv with an alternate reality twist and as much gender fuckery as we please.

shows.title: Pee-wee's Gayhouse
shows.description:
Pee-wee’s Gayhouse is a ONE NIGHT ONLY Variety Show featuring some of the best comedians & artists in Chicago. Hosted by Katie Rae Horn/Pee-wee Herman.

Featuring the talents of:
A Secret Third Thing
Maura Caruso
Da Pope
Dan Feltey
GOON
Courtney Reid Harris
Fae Lily
Zoia Mendoza
Sabrina Stoffels
Danny Wightkin

shows.title: The Male Gayze
shows.description:
Featuring:

Ty Blasing
PJ Walker
Matt Brown
Jacob Crow
Manny Petty

shows.title: FUNHAÜS: The Pride Show
shows.description: FUNHAÜS Queer Sketch Circus is Chicago's hottest comedy show for freaks & homos. Homoerotic, over-the-top, deliriously funny - FUNHAÜS delivers an unforgettable hour of original sketch comedy glittered with burlesque, drag, and endless surprises. Featuring legendary Chicago drag star Smokey Karmikael and a harem of Chicago's hottest queer & trans comedians, FUNHAÜS: The Pride Show is the explosive comedy extravaganza that turns corporate pride merch to ash.

shows.title: Mystery Machine
shows.description:
A mysterious haunt.

Suspicious suspects.

Four meddlin’ detectives.

Each performance is a completely original spooky mystery adventure packed with clues, laughs, chases, surprises, and a final unmasking.

shows.title: The Séance
shows.description:
A Victorian séance. Live on stage.

The Séance is an original stage show that recreates an authentic Victorian-era séance. We investigate the history, tell the stories of the participants, and demonstrate the exact techniques used by psychics and mediums who claimed to contact the dead.

It's a time machine — we're taking you back to the heyday of the séance.

Tonight, you will learn exactly how a séance was performed.

——

What it's NOT: The Séance is not an "actual" séance, nor is it a cheesy ghost tour. We perform live demonstrations and tell stories based on the real history of early-1900s séance shows.

A spook-house show for the smart set.

——

"Prepare to be fascinated!" — WGN Radio
"It's a history lesson in what we don't know." — Scapi Magazine
"Phenomenal show! I was thrilled from beginning to end." — TripAdvisor ★★★★★
"An evening very well spent." — TripAdvisor ★★★★★

faq.question: What is The Séance?
faq.answer: An original stage show recreating an authentic Victorian-era séance. We demonstrate the exact techniques used by mediums who claimed to contact the dead, based on real history from the early 1900s.

faq.question: Is it a real séance?
faq.answer: It is not an "actual" séance. Every demonstration is based on real historical technique. Make of that what you will.

faq.question: Is it interactive?
faq.answer: Yes. Audience members participate. You've been warned.

faq.question: Is it for children?
faq.answer: Oh no. We discuss actual death, volunteers yell curse words when frightened, and we're performing in a nightclub. There will be booze. 21+ only. Valid ID required at the door.

faq.question: Why did it sell out last year?
faq.answer: Every show in 2025 sold out. Seats are limited, and this is an intimate theater experience.

shows.title: Red Velvet Comedy
shows.description:
Bring your best 5 minutes to Red Velvet Comedy, a competition mic in which winners are given paid slots in Stars & Garters' comedy, variety, and burlesque shows. Only 25 slots; pre-registration required using this form.

Comics will be judged by two rotating judges plus an audience vote, so bring your friends and pad your stats!

One-drink minimum.

shows.title: Luis Carreon - Que Sera Sera
shows.description: Join Magician Luis Carreon as he shares his favorite pieces of magic that he has learned over a 22-year career. Expect laughs, moments of amazement, and the unexpected. What will the show be? I guess Que sera sera!

shows.title: Bright Star Circus
shows.tagline: Circus-themed variety show for the whole family
shows.description:
Step right up and experience the wonder of the Bright Star Circus!

Every Saturday at noon, the Stars & Garters Theater transforms into a magical playground of pure imagination. Perfect for audiences of all ages, this family-friendly variety show features a dazzling, rotating cast of premier talent. No two weeks are ever the same!

Bring the whole family to witness a spectacular lineup that includes:

• Mind-Boggling Magicians pulling secrets out of thin air.
• World-Class Musicians and rhythm-makers setting the beat.
• Side-Splitting Comedians & Clowns guaranteed to tickle your funny bone.
• Dynamic Dancers and variety performers pushing the boundaries of fun.

Whether you're 5 or 95, Bright Star Circus is the ultimate weekend treat. Grab your tickets, find your seats, and get ready for an unforgettable afternoon of laughter, gasps, and pure theatrical joy!

shows.title: Dark Star Circus
shows.description:
Leave the kids at home and step into the shadows for Dark Star Circus: the seductive, unfiltered, and delightfully wicked after-hours variety show at Stars & Garters Theater.

When the sun goes down, the velvet curtains rise on this spectacle with a sharp, adult edge, this late-night extravaganza features a rotating cast of premier performers ready to push the boundaries of fun. Expect plenty of laughs and a whole lot of allure. No two weeks are ever the same!

Brace yourself for a thrilling, fast-paced lineup featuring:

• Seductive Dancers moving to the rhythm of a pulsing soundtrack.
• Mind-Bending Magicians delivering illusions with a cheeky twist.
• Uncensored Comedians & Clowns guaranteed to make you blush and laugh until it hurts.
• Late-Night Musicians keeping the energy electric all night long.

Whether you're looking for an unforgettable date night or a wild evening out with friends, Dark Star Circus serves up the perfect blend of comedy, spectacle, and pure temptation. Grab a drink, leave your inhibitions at the door, and get ready for a show that's anything but innocent!

shows.title: Late Nite Catechism: Holy Ghost Bingo
shows.description:
Who is the patron saint of werewolves? Which saint died and went to hell, then came back to life? Which two saints practiced black magic before switching to Catholicism? You’ll learn the answers to these and more in Vicki Quade’s Halloween comedy, Holy Ghost Bingo: God, Goblins, & Games, coming in October for four Sunday matinee performances.

The premise is that Mrs. Mary Margaret O’Brien, a former nun, is here tonight to raise money while playing bingo and talking about Halloween traditions, scary movies, condemned board games, haunted churches, the best candy, and the worst costumes. It’s a crazy night of Halloween trivia, audience interaction, and the funniest costume contest you’ve ever seen.

shows.title: Late Nite Catechism: Trivia Bingo
shows.tagline: Catholic Guilt, Latin Mass, and Nuns
shows.description:
Meet the latest in the Nuns4Fun LNC series. It’s Late Nite Catechism Trivia Bingo, and it promises to have you laughing your sins off.

Written by Vicki Quade, one of the creators of the hit comedy, Late Nite Catechism, this bingo comedy looks at everything Catholic, from school uniforms to nuns with attitude.

And you actually play games of bingo and win silly prizes.

Audiences are loving this new show. “It was great and so terrific to laugh so hard!” says Kate Mini, who attended the show’s premiere. “We absolutely adored everything. The show, the audience, all so much fun,” says Judy Rossignuolo-Rice, legendary Chicago actress.

shows.title: The Loop
shows.description: One audience suggestion kicks off an entirely improvised chain reaction: the suggestion becomes the music, the music becomes the scenes, the scenes become the music. The Loop begins. Featuring original live scoring from Banana Acid and some of Chicago’s most adventurous improvisers, The Loop explores what happens when live comedy and live music stop accompanying each other and start actively collaborating in real time. Fast, fun, and ever-changing, join The Loop for a collision of live music and improvised comedy, where every moment reshapes the next in real time. One night only. It will never happen this way again.

shows.title: The Good, The Bad, and The Freak
shows.tagline: A Standup Show Hosted by Sam Rossi
shows.description:
Performers:
Sohrab Forouzesh
Luke Neumann
Grace Kilpatrick

shows.title: Carded
shows.tagline: The future is unclear. But the comedy is inevitable.
shows.description:
In this spooky, hilarious improv show, an audience member receives a live divination reading that conjures the inspiration for an improvised set that’ll have you laughing while wondering, “why is this weirdly accurate?”

Equal parts comedy show and séance, we let the art of divination take shape as spontaneous characters, scenes, and stories through whatever the universe and the audience decide to reveal.

This is a one hour show with no intermission.
